title: Analyse edaphic interactions of trees and structures
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Analyse edaphic interactions of trees and structures demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine soil attributes for a specified site

pcs.text: Investigate angle of repose of soils and impact on structures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate angle of repose of soils and impact on structures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate angle of repose of soils and impact on structures.
